00470| 4. **Commit pattern:** Separate test and implementation commits
00471| 
00472| **Red flags (STOP and restart):**
00473| - Writing code before test
00474| - Test passes immediately
00475| - Rationalizing "just this once"
00476| 
00477| **Completion:** All tests pass, reported via `bd comment <beads-id> "Phase: Validation"`
00478| 
00479| **Reference:** See `~/.claude/skills/worker/feature-impl/reference/phase-implementation-tdd.md` and `reference/tdd-best-practices.md`.
00480| 
00481| ---
00482| 
00483| ### Implementation Phase (Direct Mode)
00484| 
00485| **Purpose:** Implement non-behavioral changes without TDD overhead.
00486| 
00487| **When to use:** Refactoring, configuration, documentation, code cleanup.
00488| 
00489| ⚠️ **Critical:** If changing behavior → STOP and switch to TDD mode.
00490| 
00491| **Key workflow:**
00492| 1. **Pre-impl exploration:** Verify change is non-behavioral
00493| 2. Run existing tests (establish baseline)
00494| 3. Make focused changes (≤2 files, ≤1 hour)
00495| 4. Verify no regressions
00496| 
00497| **Completion:** Tests pass, reported via `bd comment <beads-id> "Phase: Validation"`
00498| 
00499| **Reference:** See `~/.claude/skills/worker/feature-impl/reference/phase-implementation-direct.md`.
00500| 
00501| ---
00502| 
00503| ### Validation Phase
00504| 
00505| **Purpose:** Verify implementation works as intended.
00506| 
00507| **Validation levels:**
00508| 
00509| | Level | Workflow |
00510| |-------|----------|
00511| | `none` | Commit, report complete |
00512| | `tests` | Run test suite, verify pass, commit |
00513| | `smoke-test` | Tests + manual verification + evidence capture |
00514| | `multi-phase` | Tests + smoke + STOP for orchestrator approval |
00515| 
00516| **⚠️ UI Visual Verification (MANDATORY if web/ files modified):**
00517| 
00518| Before completing, run: `git diff --name-only | grep "^web/"`
00519| 
00520| If ANY files returned → Visual verification is REQUIRED:
00521| 1. Rebuild server: `make install` then restart via `orch servers`
00522| 2. Capture screenshot via Playwright MCP (`browser_take_screenshot` tool)
00523| 3. Document evidence: `bd comment <beads-id> "Visual verification: [description]"`
00524| 
00525| **⛔ Cannot mark Phase: Complete without visual evidence for web/ changes.**
00526| 
00527| **When validation fails:**
00528| 1. Check logs for runtime errors (test output, project logs)
00529| 2. Analyze failure output
00530| 3. Return to Implementation, fix, re-validate
00531| 
00532| **Completion:** Validation evidence documented, reported via `bd comment`
00533| 
00534| **Reference:** See `~/.claude/skills/worker/feature-impl/reference/phase-validation.md` and `reference/validation-examples.md`.

00538| ### Integration Phase
00539| 
00540| **Purpose:** Combine multiple validated phases into cohesive feature.
00541| 
00542| **When to use:** Multi-phase features after individual phases validated.
00543| 
00544| **Key workflow:**

00546| 2. Identify integration points (data flow, shared state, API contracts)
00547| 3. Write integration tests for cross-phase scenarios

00556| 
00557| ## Self-Review Phase (REQUIRED)
00558| 
00559| **Purpose:** Quality gate before completion.
00560| 
00561| **Perform these checks before marking complete:**
00562| 
00563| ### Original Symptom Validation (For Bug Fixes)
00564| - [ ] Re-ran the EXACT command/scenario from original issue (same flags, same mode)
00565| - [ ] Documented actual result (not an estimate) via `bd comment`
00566| - [ ] If testing different mode/flag than original, explicitly justified why
00567| 
00568| **⚠️ Scope Redefinition Warning:** Agents can claim "fix complete" by testing a different scenario (e.g., `--json` flag when issue showed bare command). The fix is only verified when the original failing scenario passes.
00569| 
00570| ### Anti-Pattern Detection
00571| - [ ] No god objects (files >300 lines or multiple concerns)
00572| - [ ] No tight coupling (use dependency injection)
00573| - [ ] No magic values (use named constants)
00574| - [ ] No deep nesting (>3 levels → extract to helpers)
00575| - [ ] No incomplete work (TODOs, placeholders)
00576| 
00577| ### Security Review
00578| - [ ] No hardcoded secrets
00579| - [ ] No injection vulnerabilities (SQL, XSS, command, path traversal)
00580| 
00581| ### Commit Hygiene
00582| - [ ] Conventional format: `type: description`
00583| - [ ] Atomic commits (one logical change each)
00584| - [ ] No WIP commits
00585| 
00586| ### Test Coverage
00587| - [ ] Happy path tested
00588| - [ ] Edge cases covered
00589| - [ ] Error paths tested
00590| 
00591| ### Documentation
00592| - [ ] Public APIs documented

00594| 
00595| ### Deliverables

00602| - [ ] New routes registered

00604| - [ ] No orphaned code
00605| 
00606| ### Demo Data Ban (CRITICAL)
00607| - [ ] No fake identities in production code
00608| - [ ] No placeholder domains (use env vars)
00609| - [ ] No lorem ipsum or magic numbers as data
00610| 
00611| ### Scope Verification (For refactoring/migration)
00612| - [ ] Ran `rg "old_pattern"` - should return 0

00615| ### Discovered Work

00618| 
00619| ### Original Symptom Validation (For Bug Fixes)
00620| 
00621| ⚠️ **This gate is MANDATORY for bug fixes.** Skip only for pure features/refactoring.
00622| 
00623| **Purpose:** Prevent "scope redefinition" - fixing a different problem than the original symptom.

00629| 2. **Document the actual result** in a beads comment:

00631|    bd comment <beads-id> "Original symptom validation: [command] → [result]"
00632|    ```
00633| 3. **Compare against original evidence** - is the symptom resolved?
00634| 
00635| **⚠️ Scope Redefinition Warning:**
00636| If your fix validates against a DIFFERENT command/mode than the original issue:
00637| - Example: Original issue shows text mode slow, you're testing JSON mode
00638| - Example: Original issue shows `--verbose` flag, you're testing without it
00639| 
00640| This is a RED FLAG. Either:
00641| - Re-test with the original command and document result
00642| - OR explicitly justify why the different command is a valid proxy (with beads comment)
00643| 
00644| **Checklist:**
00645| - [ ] Re-ran exact original command from issue
00646| - [ ] Documented actual timing/behavior via `bd comment`
00647| - [ ] Result matches expected fix (not an estimate like "~10s")
00648| - [ ] If testing different mode/flags: justified why via `bd comment`
00649| 
00650| **If issues found:** Fix immediately, commit, re-verify.
00651| 
00652| **If validation skipped:** Document why in completion comment (e.g., "Original symptom validation: N/A - pure refactoring, no bug fix")
00653| 
00654| **Reference:** `.kb/investigations/2025-12-29-inv-root-cause-analysis-agent-orch.md` - Root cause analysis showing why this gate matters.

00656| **If issues found:** Fix immediately, commit, re-verify.

00662| ## Leave it Better (REQUIRED)

00664| **Purpose:** Every session should externalize what you learned.
